content: Stormcloak Soldier: ... and that's why we keep our traditions strong. The Empire wants us to forget who we are, but we won't bend. These blue cloths we wear? They're more than just armor. They're a statement. Lydia: Damn right. All this liberal nonsense in the cities... it makes me sick. At least out here we know what matters. Strength. Honor. Keeping the bloodline pure. MJR knows it too. He appreciates a woman who knows her place. Stormcloak Soldier: Your Thane sounds like a wise man. We need more leaders like him who understand the true ways of Skyrim. Lydia: He's not just wise. He's powerful. Strong. And he likes his women obedient. Like they should be.
